chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2635 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 12.02.2026 Mr. Faqeer Muhammad Tunio, Advocate alongwith petitioners M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh alongwith Mr. Raza Mian, DSP (Legal-II), CPO, Karachi, SIP Muhammad Ramzan, PI Jawed Ahmed, I.O and SIP Illahi Bux, P.S Gulshan-e- Iqbal, Karachi ---------------------- I.O is present and submits that he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has affirmed that she has contracted freewill marriage with petitioner No.2, and places copy thereof on record. Mr. Muhammad Ajmal Jatoi, Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.8, taken on record. He submits that petitioner No.1 is minor therefore is not competent to enter into Nikkah or perform marital obligations. Since the petitioners have come before this Court seeking protection at the hands of private respondents, besides claim of respondent No.8 that petitioner No.1 not being adult and minor is not competent to contract marriage is concerned, the respondent(s) may have alternative remedy before appropriate forum. Hence, this petition, in view of above, as well as no objection extended by the police officials is hereby disposed of. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
